diff: Operational GovOps Soter Labs, Operational Facilitator Redline Facilitation Group, and Launch Agent 6 can change the signers of the Plasma SkyLink Freezer Multisig so long as:
- two (2) signers are required to execute transactions;
- three (3) signers are controlled by Operational GovOps Soter Labs;
- one (1) signer is controlled by Operational Facilitator Redline Facilitation Group; and
- one (1) signer is controlled by Launch Agent 6.
description: Adds documentation for the Plasma SkyLink Bridge, specifying Freezer Multisig configuration, Rate Limits, and Validator parameters.

prTitle: Atomic Atlas: decompose Sky Atlas.md into one-folder-per-document tree + sync tooling
